labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 481211 ($5,598,697,853) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 481211 ($26,713,034,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

occupations.title: Laborers and Freight, Stock, and Material Movers, Hand

First-Line Supervisors of Mechanics, Installers, and Repairers
